beanstalk.ApplicationName.Docs: A name for the Elastic Beanstalk application. If you don't specify a name, AWS CloudFormation generates a unique physical ID and uses that ID for the application name. For more information, see [Name Type](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-name.html).  If you specify a name, you cannot perform updates that require replacement of this resource. You can perform updates that require no or some interruption. If you must replace the resource, specify a new name.

beanstalk.ResourceLifecycleConfig.Docs: Specifies an application resource lifecycle configuration to prevent your application from accumulating too many versions.
